title: azorella biloba
intro: Azorella biloba, also known as Raoul's rosemary or Raoul's mountain pepper, is a plant species native to the southern alpine regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Azorella biloba include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Azorella biloba is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal and culinary uses.
